rows.creator_dept: Egypt Network Assurance & O&M Dept
rows.remark:
Based on the standard non-SDN layer3 solution, for EOR, the service physical interfaces between EOR switches and DC GW routers, between EOR switches and service TOR switches, and between EOR switches and peer-link physical interfaces must be configured. The DAD physical interfaces do not need to be configured. According to the QoS policy of service packets, the port queue scheduling configuration needs to be adjusted on the interface. The be-ef queue uses DRR scheduling, the cs6/cs7 queue uses PQ scheduling, and the be-ef queue uses DRR scheduling ratios of 10, 10, and 20, respectively. 20, 50, and 100, which can be configured on the corresponding service physical interface.

Suggest to configure the following QoS commands on the interfaces.
interface xx //Enter the physical interface view. Configure scheduling between EOR switches and DC GWs, between EOR switches and service TOR switches, and between EOR switches.
 qos drr 0 to 5 //Configure queues 0 to 5 to use the DRR scheduling mode. By default, queues 0 to 7 are scheduled in PQ mode.
 qos queue 0 drr weight 10 //Set the DRR scheduling ratio of queue 0 to 10.
 qos queue 1 drr weight 10 //Set the DRR scheduling ratio of queue 1 to 10.
 qos queue 2 drr weight 20 //Set the DRR scheduling ratio of queue 2 to 20.
 qos queue 3 drr weight 20 //Set the DRR scheduling ratio of queue 3 to 20.
 qos queue 4 drr weight 50 //Set the DRR scheduling ratio of four queues to 50.
 qos queue 5 drr weight 100 //Set the DRR scheduling ratio of queue 5 to 100.
#
rows.creator: Malak Talaat Shokry 84322814
rows.risk_description: Check the QoS configuration of the service EOR switch.
rows.risk_title: EORs for QoS configuration of the service EOR switch.

rows.remark:
Based on the standard non-SDN layer3 solution, for TOR, the physical service interfaces between TOR switches and service EOR switches, between TOR switches and access servers, and between TOR switches and peer-link physical interfaces must be configured. The physical interfaces for DAD detection do not need to be configured. Based on the QoS policy of service packets, adjust the port-queue scheduling configuration on the interface. The be-ef uses DRR scheduling, and the cs6/cs7 uses PQ scheduling. The DRR scheduling ratios of BE-ef queues are 10, 10, 20, 20, 50, and 100, respectively. You only need to configure the DRR scheduling ratios on the corresponding service physical interface.

Suggest to configure the following QoS commands on the interfaces.
interface 100GE //Enter the physical interface view. Configure scheduling between TORs and EORs, between TORs and servers, and between TORs and TORs.
 qos drr 0 to 5 //Configure queues 0 to 5 to use the DRR scheduling mode. By default, PQ scheduling is used. The value ranges from 0 to 7.
 qos queue 0 drr weight 10 //Set the DRR scheduling ratio of queue 0 to 10.
 qos queue 1 drr weight 10 //Set the DRR scheduling ratio of queue 1 to 10.
 qos queue 2 drr weight 20 //Set the DRR scheduling ratio of queue 2 to 20.
 qos queue 3 drr weight 20 //Set the DRR scheduling ratio of queue 3 to 20.
 qos queue 4 drr weight 50 //Set the DRR scheduling ratio of four queues to 50.
 qos queue 5 drr weight 100 //Set the DRR scheduling ratio of queue 5 to 100.
#
rows.creator: Malak Talaat Shokry 84322814

rows.risk_title: TORs-QoS Configuration

rows.remark:
The stp bridge-address configured on one pair of M-LAG devices is different. For one pair of M-LAG devices, the stp bridge-address should be configured as the same one. 
GIZA_RN02_CtrSrvTOR01:
stp bridge-address is not configured
GIZA_RN02_CtrSrvTOR02:
stp bridge-address 148c-4a7e-60c0

Please configure the same stp bridge MAC address on one pair of M-LAG devices as the MAC address shown in the Active field of "display stp v-stp" command.
This operation will cause STP re-converage, and may cause service impact. Please create RFC, apply service downtime, and do the operation in the operation window.
<HUAWEI> display stp v-stp
Bridge Information: 
   V-STP Mode          :True
   Bridge Mac          :Config=xx / Active=xx
   Peer-link Name      :Eth-Trunk0

rows.creator: Abdullah Hesham 00960243
rows.risk_description:
Scenario 1
When the NE version is V100R021C10SPC300, if logic soft errors occur only on the active system control board, and services are configured or service boards are warm/cold reset, an active/standby switchover of system control boards will be triggered; if logic soft errors also occur on the standby system control board, repeated active/standby switchovers of system control boards will be triggered and the NE will be unreachable by the NMS.
Scenario 2
When the NE version is V100R023C10SPC100, if logic soft errors occur only on the active system control board, an active/standby switchover of system control boards will be triggered; if logic soft errors occur on both the active and standby system control boards, repeated active/standby switchovers of system control boards will be triggered and the NE will be unreachable by the NMS.
rows.risk_title: [TN-P-202505] Notice on Precaution for Abnormal System Control Board Switching Causes NE Unreachability Due to Logic Soft Errors on the System Control Board of OSN 9800&9600

rows.creator: Eslam Hesham Mohamed 00961983
rows.risk_description:
Scenario 1
When the NE version is V100R021C10SPC300, if logic soft errors occur only on the active system control board, and services are configured or service boards are warm/cold reset, an active/standby switchover of system control boards will be triggered; if logic soft errors also occur on the standby system control board, repeated active/standby switchovers of system control boards will be triggered and the NE will be unreachable by the NMS.
Scenario 2
When the NE version is V100R023C10SPC100, if logic soft errors occur only on the active system control board, an active/standby switchover of system control boards will be triggered; if logic soft errors occur on both the active and standby system control boards, repeated active/standby switchovers of system control boards will be triggered and the NE will be unreachable by the NMS.
rows.risk_title: [TN-P-202505] Notice on Precaution for Abnormal System Control Board Switching Causes NE Unreachability Due to Logic Soft Errors on the System Control Board of OSN 9800&9600

rows.creator_dept: Egypt Network Assurance & O&M Dept
rows.remark:
1. Run the display transceiver verbose command to view information about all optical modules on the device.
2. Check whether the bias current, receive power, and transmit power of all interfaces are displayed. If no, go to the next step.
3. Check whether the bias current, receive power, and transmit power of all optical interfaces are within the threshold range of the optical module. (If the upper and lower thresholds of the transmit//receive power are set, the thresholds are used for judgment. If the upper and lower thresholds of the transmit/receive power are not set, the default upper and lower thresholds of the transmit/receive power are used for judgment.). If no, record the port number $port and proceed to the next step. Otherwise, the check is not involved.
4. Run the display interface brief command on the device to check the PHY status of all unqualified interfaces $port. If the PHY status is *down, the check is not applicable. Otherwise, go to the next step.
5. If the port status in step 4 is Down and the receive optical power is –40 or –50, the check is not applicable. Otherwise, a risk is reported.
rows.creator: Hassan Saber Ebrahim 00926692

rows.creator_dept: Egypt Network Assurance & O&M Dept
rows.remark:
1. Run the display current-configuration command in the user view to obtain the configuration. Check whether the Eth-Trunk interface contains the peer-link configuration and record the Eth-Trunk interface number, for example, eth-trunk0. If no peer-link configuration is matched, the check is not involved. Otherwise, go to the next step.
2. Run the display version command to check the device version. If the device version is 168 or the version is not V300, go to the next step. Otherwise, check whether the device card <card-value> card-type record exists in the configuration file. If yes, go to the next step. Otherwise, return N//A.
3. Run the display interface brief command in the user view to find the Eth-Trunk interface recorded in (1). Check whether the member interfaces whose PHY status is Up reside on different boards or subcards. If at least one of the first and second digits of the port number following GE is different, the check is passed. Otherwise, the check is not passed. If only one member interface is Up, the check fails.

rows.creator_dept: 运营商运维与维护交付运营部
rows.confirm_comment:
[Root Cause]
If a subscriber who is in arrears initiates a call, the SCP changes the called number and sends the changed number to the MSOFTX3000. After receiving the new number, the MSOFTX3000 routes the call to a SIP office direction. However, if the SIP office direction becomes unreachable in this case, the MSOFTX3000 uses the original called number to perform reanalysis and reroutes the call based on the analysis result. As a result, the call is not suppressed.
 
[Impact and Risk]  
Calls initiated by subscribers who are in arrears are not suppressed, causing charging loss.
rows.remark: Eslam Abd El Hakim Ali Mahmoud 00467773
rows.creator: zhuhua 60031404
rows.risk_description:
In 2018 and 2024, the MSOFTX3000 released the precaution notice twice, requiring that bit 2 of P961 be set to 0. However, this was not implemented on the live network. The warning links are as follows:https://support.huawei.com/carrier/docview?nid=SC2200018531&path=PBI1-21262245/PBI1-21435190/PBI1-24030871/PBI1-21782489/PBI1-15663
In 2025, the configuration rectification requirement was released, but this was not implemented on the live network. The rectification link is https://support.huawei.com/carrier/docview?nid=SC2200019471&path=PBI1-21262245/PBI1-21435190/PBI1-24030871/PBI1-21782489/PBI1-15663. 
If the rectification is not performed, there is a risk of charging loss due to calls being connected for subscribers with outstanding fees. For details, refer to the precaution notice.
rows.risk_title: In 2018 and 2024, the MSOFTX3000 released the precaution notice twice, requiring that bit 2 of P961 be set to 0. However, this was not implemented on the live network.

rows.risk_description:
According to the inspection report, critical alarms SWDL_CHGMNG_NOMATCH or SYNC_FAIL exsit on some NEs . 
The SWDL_CHGMNG_NOMATCH alarm indicates a mismatch between the host software and the board software, and the automatic matching function for package loading is turned off.
The SYNC_FAIL alarm indicates a failure in synchronizing the master and slave system control database files.
If the equipment has these alarms, when NE power failure and restart, if the original slave system control board completes power-on startup first, it will automatically dispatch the configuration of the original slave system control board, which may lead to configuration loss and service impact.
rows.risk_title: Check & clear the critical alarms SWDL_CHGMNG_NOMATCH and SYNC_FAIL

rows.remark: Continuous HEART BEAT Should be enabled in the Trunk Route towards the Next HOP
rows.creator: Mohamed Nasr Afify 84372161
rows.risk_description:
[Risk of No Modification]
If heartbeat detection is not enabled, the SBC cannot detect the faulty I-CSCF, causing service failures.
[Benefits of the Modification]
The SBC sends OPTIONS messages to the I-CSCF to perform heartbeat detection. If the I-CSCF is faulty, another I-CSCF that is running properly is selected.
[Impact of the Modification]
The I-CSCF is required to process the OPTIONS messages. If the I-CSCF cannot return 200 (to OPTIONS) messages, the trunk group becomes faulty and route selection changes.
rows.risk_title: [VoLTE Key Configuration Check]Check whether heartbeat detection is enabled on the I-CSCF

BCFPARA38 Bit 28 : After querying the S-CSCF/ACCAS route mapping data, the CDB module stores the query result in the CDB module. The CDB module updates the data in the SCU module synchronously. Currently, there is a possibility that the route update fails. The route mapping in the CDB module is correct, but the route data in some SCU modules is incorrect. Messages on some modules will be sent to incorrect destination devices.
BCFPARA39 Bit 10 : Duration of call release failure in time and impact CDRs
BGFPARA5 Bit 12 : SIP messages are not bypassed. As a result, services may fail, for example, short messages are lost.
BCFPARA34 Bit 27 : When the CloudSE2980 reselects a DRA, the tPotentially parameter in the AAR message is incorrect, causing the DRA retransmission function to fail. When both DRAs respond with failure messages, the service layer of the SE2900 cannot receive an incorrect AAA message and waits for 3 seconds before sending the next message. This affects the Rx-interface traffic statistics and increases the processing delay in the reselection scenario.
rows.risk_title: CloudSE2980 4U/3U Rectification parameters

The SBC does not replace the IP address in the Contact header field when forwarding a re-INVITE message during a conference call. In this case, the SBC needs to add the Record-Route header field to the subsequent request so that the access and core networks can communicate through the SBC. The modification prevents conference call failures.

Running this command is highly risky. Exercise caution when running this command and contact Huawei technical support engineers for assistance.

rows.title: Risk Investigation of Service Disruption Triggered by Unsupported IPv6 Packets Received by Routers in Specific Scenarios 关于路由器在特定场景下收到不支持的IPv6报文触发业务受损风险排查
rows.precaution_title: 关于路由器在特定场景下收到不支持的IPv6报文触发业务受损风险排查
rows.creator: l00203087
rows.risk_description:
[Disposal Method] :
1. Investigate whether the current network involves MPAC data configuration.
Investigation Plan 1 (Recommended): Use inspection tools to investigate, refer to "IPv6 Early Warning Collection and Analysis Guide (IP Toolkit + UMC)".
Investigation Plan 2 (Manual):
1.2.1) Execute the display version command under the user view to check if the device has any issues. The following versions are involved:
1.2.1.1) ATN&NE40E&CX600&ME60&NE8000&NE9000&NE20E&PTN6900&NetEngine A800: All versions of V800
1.2.1.2) ATN: All versions of V300
1.2.2) Execute display current-configuration under the user view to check for service-security policy ipv6 configuration. If present, there is a risk.
<HUAWEI>display current-configuration | include service-security
service-security policy ipv6 test1 //test1 is an example configuration name for MPAC IPv6 policy
2. If the current network devices have MPAC data configuration, provide feedback on the number of involved devices in the task progress, and track until the risk reduction is completed, then close the investigation task.
Risk reduction closure standard: Execute the preventive measures in the early warning or complete the upgrade of the current network devices according to the rectification requirements (rectification plan released online on August 10).
3. If the current network devices are not configured with MPAC, it is not involved. Provide feedback that it is not involved, and the investigation task can be directly closed.
If there are any questions during the risk investigation process, please contact the R&D interface person Wu Haimin at 00483639.

【处置方法】：
1、    排查现网是否涉及MPAC数据配置，
排查方案1（推荐）：通过巡检工具排查，参考《IPv6预警的采集和分析指导 (IP Toolkit + UMC)》
排查方案2（手工）：
             1.2.1）在用户视图下执行display version命令，查看设备是否存在问题。下列版本涉及：
                       1.2.1.1） ATN&NE40E&CX600&ME60&NE8000&NE9000&NE20E&PTN6900&NetEngine A800:V800所有版本
                       1.2.1.2）ATN:V300所有版本
            1.2.2) 在用户视图执行display current-configuration，查看有service-security policy ipv6配置，有则存在风险。
                  <HUAWEI>display current-configuration | include service-security 
                    service-security policy ipv6 test1  //test1是举例配置MPAC IPv6策略名
2、如果现网设备有MPAC数据配置，在任务进展中反馈涉及设备数量，并跟踪到风险消减完成，再闭环排查任务。
风险消减闭环标准：执行完成预警中的预防措施或者根据整改要求完成现网设备升级（整改计划8月10日发布上网）。
3、  如果现网设备未配置MPAC，则不涉及，反馈不涉及，排查任务可以直接闭环。 

如果在风险排查过程中有任何疑问，请联系研发接口人吴海民 00483639

            1.2.2) 在用户视图执行display current-configuration，查看有service-security policy ipv6配置，有则存在风险。
                  <HUAWEI>display current-configuration | include service-security 
                    service-security policy ipv6 test1  //test1是举例配置MPAC IPv6策略名
2、如果现网设备有MPAC数据配置，在任务进展中反馈涉及设备数量，并跟踪到风险消减完成，再闭环排查任务。

rows.title: Datacom Frame-shaped Device Rectification Clearance/数通框式整改风险清理
rows.precaution_title: 数通框式整改风险清理
rows.creator: z00211079
rows.risk_description:
Background: Major faults occur on the live network caused by multiple known problems due to factors such as inaccurate IBMS data and missing rectification implementation. To eliminate risks that need to be rectified, this project is developed

Special Solution: Sort out the rectifications released in Datacom domain in the past three years, to match IBMS inventory, UMC risks and RFC, identify the list of suspected sites that have not been rectified, and track and clear the sites through this special maintenance tasks

Closure Condition:

For NEs that have been rectified on the live network:
1. If the NE information is consistent with that in the IBMS, can close the CPT task directly. Remark as "The NEs have been rectified and the IBMS has been updated". The closure condition is to upload the screenshot of the current IB information in the CPT task

2. If the NE information is inconsistent with that in the IBMS, the IBMS needs to be updated. The closure condition is to upload the screenshot of the updated IB information in the CPT task

For NEs that have not been rectified on the live network:
1. If the customer agree to implement the rectification, complete the rectification in 2025 and update the IBMS.
(1) If Huawei implements the rectification with RCxxx ticket, the closure condition is to associate the RCxxx ticket in the CPT task and upload the updated IB information screenshot in the CPT task

(2) If Huawei implements the rectification without RCxxx ticket, the closure condition is to associate the RFC ticket in the CPT task and upload the updated IB information screenshot in the CPT task

(3) If customer implements the rectification, the closure condition is to upload the screenshot of the updated IB information in the CPT task

2. If the customer does not agree to the rectification, obtain effective record filing documents and associate the RCxxx ticket. The closure condition is to associate the RCxxx ticket in the CPT task and upload effective record filing documents in the CPT task

3.If the rectification is delayed to 2026, create RCxxx ticket，obtain effective record filing documents and associate the RCxxx ticket. The closure condition is to associate the RCxxx ticket in the CPT task and upload effective record filing documents in the CPT task，the rectification will be managed as a routine delay at 2026

For NEs that have been offline from the live network: Can close the CPT task directly. Remark as "The NEs have been already offline" and delete the corresponding IBMS inventory information. There is no closure condition


If you have any questions about inspection and risk clearance, contact Zhang Lei (employee ID: 00556734)




专项背景：因IBMS数据不准、整改实施遗漏等因素，导致现网发生多起已知问题引发的现网重大故障，为清理整改应做未做的风险，特开展本专项

专项方案：梳理数通近三年发布的整改，多维度匹配IBMS存量/巡检风险/Netcare变更单，识别出“疑似”未整改局点清单，并通过“专项维护任务”跟踪清理

闭环条件：

对于在网且现网已整改的网元：
1.如果网元信息和IBMS一致，直接闭环，闭环时备注“已整改，且IBMS已刷新”，闭环条件是在CPT风险流程上传当前IB信息截图

2.如果网元信息和IBMS不一致，需要刷新IBMS，闭环条件是在CPT风险流程上传刷新后IB信息截图

对于在网的现网未整改的网元：
1.如果客户决策实施，需要于25年正常完成整改，并刷新IBMS：
(1)如果华为实施，需要整改单：闭环条件是在CPT风险流程关联整改单（整改单里面关联RFC闭环），并在CPT风险流程中上传IB信息截图

(2)如果华为实施，不需要整改单：闭环条件是在CPT风险流程直接关联RFC单，并在CPT风险流程中上传IB信息截图

(3)如果客户实施：闭环条件是在CPT风险流程上传IB信息截图

2.如果客户决策不实施，需要获取有效的备案文件，并关联整改单。闭环条件是在CPT风险流程关联整改单，并在CPT风险流程中上传有效的备案文件

3.如果延期到2026年整改，需要获取有效的备案文件，并关联整改单。闭环条件是在CPT风险流程关联整改单，并在CPT风险流程中上传有效的备案文件，26年作为例行延期整改管理

对于已下线的网元：直接闭环，备注“已下线”，并刷新IBMS存量信息。无闭环条件

rows.title: 电信云数据第三方备份/Telecom Cloud Data Third-Party Backup
rows.precaution_title: 电信云数据第三方备份
rows.creator: y00543860
rows.risk_description:
多国多运营商陆续出现CloudOS故障，网元虚拟机故障或者丢失，所有上层业务受损或完全中断，由于局点未进行I层数据的第三方备份，业务受损时间长、甚至只能重新部署，局点业务恢复时间不可控。
23年作为TOPN专项任务与各区域CS业务主管，高督做专题沟通。通过NETCARE的风险运营中心按照涉及客户群下发任务到各代表处并进行进展跟踪，专项执行过程中问题通过ITR流程支持，本次要求电信云C面全部实现第三方数据备份。
跟踪闭环措施:
1.电信云第三方备份专项任务关闭必须关联RFC单。
2.将FS、FSOM和Fusionstage数据备份成功任务截图上传TOPN任务，任务可闭环，如果有多个DC，可以将截图按DC站点名字区分，一起上传。
3.如果客户不批准第三方备份，上传客户不同意邮件
Cloud OS faults occur in multiple countries and carriers. The VM of NE is faulty or lost, all upper-layer services are damaged or completely interrupted. As the third-party data backup at the IaaS layer is not performed at the site, the service interruption time is long or even the site needs to be redeployed. The service restoration time is uncontrollable.
Communicated with regional CS business directors and senior supervisors as a special task for TOPN in 2023. The NetCare assigns tasks to rep offices based on the customer groups involved and tracks the progress, the TOP N must be resolved through the ITR process，all C plane of Telcom Cloud must finish third-party data backup,
Tracking and closed-loop measures:
1. The third-party backup task of the telecom cloud must be associated with RFC ticket.
2.Upload the screenshots of successful data backup tasks of FusionSphere, FusionSphere OM, and FusionStage to the top N tasks. The tasks can be closed. If there are multiple DCs, the screenshots can be separated by DC site name and uploaded together.
3.If customer don’t approve the third-party backup, upload customer email

rows.title: Risk of Digital Certificate Expiration
rows.creator: f00199581
rows.risk_description:
【NE involved】
All BSC6900/6910 controller & All 2/3/4/5 G sites

[Problem Description]
A preconfigured certificate is issued by the vendor's CA and is used only to establish an initial secure channel for devices to access the customer network during deployment. According to 3GPP TS 33.310, the certificate preconfigured by the vendor must be replaced with the operator certificate before commercial use. Currently, a large number of devices on the carrier's network still use Huawei pre-configured certificates. In October 2024, the preconfigured certificates of nearly 3000 base station controllers will expire. After the certificates expire, the OMCH between the base station controllers and the U2000 will be disconnected.

【Solution】
1: Deploy operator-own CA
2. Deploy MAE LiteCA

【Guide】：http://3ms.huawei.com/km/groups/2026591/blogs/details/13748395?l=zh-cn&moduleId=732999204558016512&ctype=-1

【Risk mitigation and confirmation】
(1) Collect all wireless NE data for HQ/Romania GTAC to analyze certificate risk.
(2) Complete risk mitigation based on the customer's mitigation solution and plan (refer to the task/risk closure conditions), in the guide.
(3) Frontline engineers collect controller data on live network again and HQ analyzes the data and confirms that the controller certificate has been replaced.

rows.title: Notice on Hardening GU Controller Reliability to enhance the network anti-risk capability.
rows.precaution_title: Notice on Hardening GU Controller Reliability to enhance the network anti-risk capability.
rows.creator: f00199581
rows.risk_description:
heck whether below risk existing in current network or not. if yes, record risk in system to follow up

[Problem Scenario]:Power terminals are carbonized and burnt at multiple sites in high-temperature countries.
[Fault Symptom]:In high-temperature areas, the power terminals of high-power modules are carbonized and burnt.
[Trigger Condition]:1. The stripped length of the power cable is insufficient.The contact resistance becomes large after the insulation layer is pressed. As a result, the power cable is overheated and burnt. 2. The power cable at the ground clip is not well-made and has no shield layer. The insulation of the cable is damaged and short-circuited with the ground clip.

[Check Method]:
1. For sites earlier than SRAN17.1SPC180, extract central-layer fault logs(section 2.4 in the guide) and inventory files(section 2.2 in the guide).
2. In SRAN17.1SPC180 and later versions, the resistance detection solution is incorporated to identify risky sites based on power supply alarm monitoring. RFTEST logs(section 2.6 in the guide) and inventory files(section 2.2 in the guide) need to be extracted to accurately identify high-risk sites.
3、Send the collected inventory files and central-layer fault logs/RFTEST logs to Zhou Cai 0051065 for data analysis.
Refer to the below link for details,
http://3ms.huawei.com/hi/group/2026591/file_17561981.html?for_statistic_from=my_group_file
If you have any questions, contact Ma Chunlei (00330741) and Zhang Tianbo (00621356).
